title: Special Committee on the Defence of Canada Regulations, An Act to grant access to records of the
title_en: Special Committee on the Defence of Canada Regulations, An Act to grant access to records of the
short_name: Special Committee on the Defence of C...
description: An Act to grant access to records of the Special Committee on the Defence of Canada Regulations (Special Committee on the Defence of C...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Right of access to records
provisions.content: 1 (1) Every person has a right to and shall, on request, be given access to any records of the House of Commons Special Committee on the Defence of Canada Regulations, whith sat in camera from 1939 to 1945. (2) A person who is granted access to a record under subsection (1) shall be given an opportunity to examine the record or shall be given a copy thereof. (3) A person who makes a request for access to a record may be required to pay, before any copies are made, a fee reflecting the cost of reproduction. record

provisions.title: Fees
provisions.content: 2 For the purposes of this Act, record means all the minutes of the Committee proceedings, correspondence, memoranda and any other documentary material relevant to the Committee proceedings.
